Learn More Download form Book Book Us And say “Cheese” in confidence Services Preventive Dentistry Prosthetic Dentistry Cosmetic Dentistry Kids Dentistry Gum Diseases and Treatment Orthodontic Braces and Aligners Dental Implants High Caries Management Fluride Treatment Clear Aligners Smile Makeover General Dentistry Wisdom Tooth Extraction Make appointment Imported Dental Materials The well-being of our visitors is our key priority. To ensure the provision of reliable services, we prioritize sourcing dental materials from trusted and credible sources. Our association with the internationally recognized brands guarantees uncompromising quality in resources. We follow a rigorous process to ensure the materials acquired meet the highest standards.
Step into our clinic and let us discover your branded Smile together! Feedback Great experience at Garden City Smiles. Dr. Deepti outlined the course my treatment would take and gently led me through the procedure. Dr. Ganesh gave me a scaling that i would highly recommend for anyone. Thank you, Garden City Smiles!! Chandrika V Excellent service from the Dr. Deepthi. Had been to this clinic for my dental treatment and the quality and care of service was commendable. Clinic is very higiene and well maintained with latest protocols. Highly recommended to consult Dr. Deepthi for any of dental services. Manjubhaskar Manju Dr Deepti and Dr Deepa are very competent professionals. They take the time to ensure the job is done right and don't rush through. Would recommend without reservation. Ganesh Bala Dr Deepthi is thorough professional who gives detailed advice and instructions on dental hygiene. Very happy with the service provided. Nandita Mohan We got my daughter's Root canal done from the best Clinic. Clinic is with friendly Doctors, good equipment, staffs and hygiene . Thank You Dr Deepthi & Dr. Anaga for all the support.
